The '''Hunters''' were [[Special forces/Legends|elite members]] of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], a specially selected elite comprising in total perhaps one tenth of one percent of the caste. They had enhanced physical senses, and wore the [[cloak of Nuun]], which allowed them to blend into their surroundings.

Hunters were assigned to special missions regular Warriors were unskilled at. These included assassination, reconnaissance, and stealth. They could also serve in [[Commander/Legends|command]] roles leading other warriors, as [[Tsaa Qalu]] did on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].
